name: Thomson Reuters ONESOURCE - Indirect Tax Compliance
content:
Our technology powers the professionals who are shaping the world.
Meet the changemakers
Tax compliance software
Make indirect tax your strategic advantage
Prepare returns faster, with fewer errors, and gain complete audit transparency with AI-powered tax compliance software — built to help tax teams across thousands of jurisdictions worldwide
Schedule a demonstration
Compliance complexity is outpacing manual processes
Indirect tax compliance is becoming more digital, more complex, and more unforgiving due to:
Thousands of jurisdictions with constantly changing U.S. sales and use tax rules
Global digitization mandates for VAT, SAFT, S-II, and near-real-time reporting
Fragmented data across enterprise resource planning (ERP), general ledger (GL), billing, and e-commerce systems
Tight filing windows with increasing audit scrutiny
Our approach: AI that works with you, not against you
ONESOURCE combines agentic AI with predictable automation and human oversight to handle the full compliance life cycle — without sacrificing control or auditability.
Earlier and cleaner
Cut compliance cycles from 30 days to 11 days while reducing errors by up to 50%. Continuous preparation means no more end-of-period scrambling.
Explainable and auditable
Maintain full control with reversible actions — never black-box automation. Every AI action includes clear variance explanations and complete audit trails.
Scalable and smart
Add new jurisdictions without adding headcount. Agentic AI learns from your processes and handles common issues automatically.
Measurable impact from day one
$25K annual savings
Small enterprises saw a process reduction from 14 days to five days, leading to $25,000 in annual savings*
$60K annual savings
Large enterprises reduced their 30-day process down to just 11 days, resulting in annual savings of $60,000*
$50% efficiency gains
Forrester TEI study reports that organizations achieved up to 50% efficiency gains for tax-filing preparation*
*Based on internal Thomson Reuters testing
What this means for you
Shorter compliance cycles with fewer errors and less rework
Tax teams freed to focus on analysis and planning
Confident sign-off with explainable variance analysis
Scalable growth without increasing compliance risk
Complete automation across every touch point
Sales and use tax compliance
Global indirect tax compliance
AI-driven exception management
Sales and use tax compliance: U.S. and Canada
Streamline your sales and use tax compliance across the U.S. and Canada with a solution that offers:
Automated preparation of more than 1,200 state, county, and city returns
Hands-off data transfer from source systems to ready-to-file returns
Built-in validations and error prevention
Electronic filing where it’s supported
Global indirect tax compliance
Stay compliant across borders with automated support for every major global indirect tax requirement:
VAT returns by country and registration
SAFT/SII and digital reporting outputs
Prefilled return comparison and analysis
Cross-system reconciliations with detailed audit trails
AI-driven exception management
Resolve compliance exceptions faster with AI that identifies, fixes, and learns from variances:
Automated handling of mapping errors, foreign-exchange differences, and timing variances
Repeatable fixes that learn and improve over time
Clear explanations for every variance and correction
Tax compliance software for global and sales tax complexity
ONESOURCE helps tax and finance teams manage sales tax, VAT, GST, and other indirect tax obligations with AI-powered tax compliance software that supports a more touchless approach to preparation, validation, reconciliation, and filing. Connecting source data, automating repetitive compliance tasks, and enabling review-ready workflows help organizations reduce manual effort and scale compliance with greater control.
Who benefits from touchless compliance?
Tax professionals who are required to prepare and file indirect tax returns for sales and use tax, VAT, and GST
Businesses with a high volume of returns, operating in multiple jurisdictions, or with complex industry requirements
Professionals who outsource compliance but need a better way of preparing data before handing it off to service providers
Purpose-built solutions for sales tax and global VAT compliance
ONESOURCE Indirect Compliance AI
Automate global indirect tax reporting with this cloud-based platform. Continuously prepare VAT returns, SAF-T/SII filings, and listings while reconciling data across ERP systems, e-invoicing platforms, and tax authorities. Deliver review-ready packages with explainable AI and audit trails.
Learn more about ONESOURCE Indirect Compliance AI
ONESOURCE Sales & Tax Use AI
Automate sales and use tax return preparation across 1,200 U.S. jurisdictions with AI-powered touchless compliance, reducing manual processes significantly while eliminating audit risk.
Learn more about ONESOURCE Sales & Use Tax AI
Leading companies choose ONESOURCE
Frequently asked questions
What is the difference between sales tax compliance software and global tax compliance software?
Sales tax compliance software typically focuses on U.S. state and local sales and use tax obligations, including return preparation, validation, and filing. Global tax compliance software supports international indirect-tax requirements, including VAT, GST, digital reporting, listings, and country-specific filing formats across multiple jurisdictions.
How does AI help with tax compliance?
AI helps identify anomalies, classify exceptions, suggest or apply approved corrections, accelerate reconciliations, and reduce repetitive manual tasks. In ONESOURCE, AI is combined with predictable automation and human controls to support explainability, transparency, and auditability.
Who should use sales tax compliance software?
Sales tax compliance software is ideal for corporations with U.S. sales and use tax filing obligations, especially those managing large filing volumes, multiple jurisdictions, or complex compliance requirements. It is also useful for firms and enterprises seeking to reduce manual return preparation and filing efforts.
Who should use global tax compliance software?
Global tax compliance software is designed for multinational organizations that manage VAT, GST, SAFT, SII, listings, and other international indirect tax obligations. It is especially valuable for teams operating across multiple countries, systems, and digital reporting frameworks.
How does ONESOURCE improve audit readiness?
ONESOURCE improves audit readiness through built-in validations, reconciliation workflows, variance explanations, audit logs, and assembled review packs that document exceptions, adjustments, and filing evidence.
